author: lOrm
content: Fixed in src/tools/file/notebook.rs::apply_replace: a code-cell replace now resets outputs to [] and execution_count to null, computed from the effective cell type (existing cell_type or override). Markdown/raw replaces still strip those fields entirely (nbformat). Updated the previously-pinned test notebook_replace_code_cell_does_not_reset_outputs (now ..._resets_execution_count_and_outputs) plus a new markdown-cell guard. 1821/1821 lib tests pass; clippy clean.
